mano_cua.result_summary: Media Type重命名功能完全失效。找到Petstore示例中Request Body的application/json和application/xml两个Media Type，但所有操作图标（+/复制/✏️/🔄/🗑️）点击均无响应。双击文本也无法进入编辑模式。标签页切换（Main/Responses等）也完全失效。这是严重的交互功能bug。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All Media-Type row action icons completely non-functional. Tab switching also broken. Rename operation impossible.

deploy_notes: commit eb3f947160. Node.js server on port 3000. Simple npm start.
